zh.Michelgrove, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可米爾格洛福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Wiltshire於大約1437年出生在英國艾可時，她的父親Sir John Wiltshire , M.P., of Arundel and Lyminster28歲，母親Isabella Clothall30歲。她於大約1459年與Thomas Bellingham of Lyminster在英國素可萊明斯特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1510年在英國素可享年74歲。

zh-hans.Michelgrove, Sussex, England: 英国英格兰素可米爾格洛福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Wiltshire于大约1437年出生在英国艾可时，她的父亲Sir John Wiltshire , M.P., of Arundel and Lyminster28岁，母亲Isabella Clothall30岁。她于大约1459年与Thomas Bellingham of Lyminster在英国素可萊明斯特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1510年在英国素可享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wiltshire
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the county of Wiltshire in southwest central England, which gets its name from Wilton (once the county's principal town) + Old English scīr ‘shire, administrative division’.

variants.name: Wilton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places so named, including Wilton (Wiltshire, North Yorkshire), Wilton in Haile (Cumberland), and Wilton in Bridstow (Herefordshire). The North Yorkshire placename derives from Old English wilde ‘wild, uncultivated’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The Wiltshire placename may derive from Old English wull ‘wool’ + tūn. The Cumberland and Herefordshire placenames derive from Old English wilig ‘willow’ + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Wiltshire was born about 1437, in Essex, England, her father, Sir John Wiltshire , M.P., of Arundel and Lyminster, was 28 and her mother, Isabella Clothall, was 30. She married Thomas Bellingham of Lyminster about 1459, in Lyminster, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1510, in Sussex, England, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Wiltshire est née environ 1437, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Wiltshire , M.P., of Arundel and Lyminster, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Isabella Clothall, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Bellingham of Lyminster environ 1459, à Lyminster, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1510, à Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Wiltshire um 1437 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Wiltshire , M.P., of Arundel and Lyminster 28 und ihre Mutter Isabella Clothall 30. Sie hat um 1459 in Lyminster, Sussex, England Thomas Bellingham of Lyminster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1510 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Wiltshire è nata il circa 1437 nel Essex, England, sua padre, Sir John Wiltshire , M.P., of Arundel and Lyminster, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Isabella Clothall, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Bellingham of Lyminster circa 1459, nel Lyminster, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1510, nel Sussex, England, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Wiltshireが約1437年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Sir John Wiltshire , M.P., of Arundel and Lyminsterは28歳，母Isabella Clothallは30歳であった。約1459年にイギリススセックスリミンスターでThomas Bellingham of Lyminsterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1510年にイギリススセックスで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Wiltshire(이)가 대략 1437년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Wiltshire , M.P., of Arundel and Lyminster(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Clothall(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1459년 영국 수세스 림인스터에서 Thomas Bellingham of Lyminster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 영국 수세스에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Michelgrove, Sussex, England: Michelgrove, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Wiltshire nasceu aproximadamente 1437, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Wiltshire , M.P., of Arundel and Lyminster, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Clothall, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Bellingham of Lyminster aproximadamente 1459, em Lyminster, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1510, em Sussex, Inglaterra, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Wiltshire родилась около 1437 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Wiltshire , M.P., of Arundel and Lyminster было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Clothall, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Bellingham of Lyminster около 1459 г. в местности лиминстир, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1510 г. в местности суссекс, Англия в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Wiltshire nació aproximadamente 1437, en Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Wiltshire , M.P., of Arundel and Lyminster, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Isabella Clothall, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Thomas Bellingham of Lyminster aproximadamente 1459, en Lyminster, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1510, en Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años.
